name: Shiro Lounge Chair
subtitle: Cashmere Bouclé
description: Named for the Japanese word for 'white,' the Shiro chair carries a softness that is almost visual. The cashmere bouclé upholstery is sourced from a single family mill in the Scottish Borders, woven with a deliberately loose loop that creates depth and texture. The organic silhouette is sculpted from bent beech laminate with exposed joinery.
care: Brush gently with a soft garment brush in the direction of the loop. Dry clean only. Rotate and fluff regularly. Keep away from direct heat sources.
shipping: White-glove delivery included. 2-person crew, room of choice.
metaDescription: Shiro Lounge Chair in cashmere bouclé. Bent beech laminate frame. Save 12% — Now $1,680. BeautyHome by NODO Studio.
altText: Shiro lounge chair in ivory cashmere bouclé with organic sculptural silhouette on lacquered ash legs
